{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":453658,"duration_api_ms":453402,"ttft_ms":3544,"num_turns":59,"result":"Review complete. **Verdict: PASS** (0 findings) for CP00-687.

The pack is a descriptor-only P07 fixture/evidence/review tail + P08 evidence-contract foundation bridge (risk C, 150 units). I independently verified through read-only inspection that:

- **Distributions** are internally consistent (sum to 150) and identical across manifest, both contracts, and registry; enforced by the coverage validator and tests.
- **Implementation** (descriptor/case-set/Hermes/Claude/handoff functions in service.js) is complete, frozen, and `descriptor_only`/`runtime_execution=false`/`raw_payload_included=false`; resolves via index.js wildcard exports; no stub/TODO/skip markers.
- **Validators** enforce descriptor-only flags, all `runtime_opened=false`, no real/golden payloads, no cross-tenant, and `claude_is_final_approval=false`.
- **Boundaries** hold: Claude is read-only and non-final; Hermes is control-plane evidence/receipt only (not product runtime); no-write/no-real-data attestation is comprehensive; no over-claim of runtime or enterprise trust.
- **Pre-review state** is correct (`production_ready=false`, `pending_review`, empty receipts/invalid-attempts) — my review is the gating receipt.
- **Hardening**: auth preflight returned valid JSON, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, forbidden-evidence taxonomy present.

Two caveats noted in the output: (1) the 22/22 validation commands are *reported* (exit 0) — I corroborated their structural assertions by source inspection but could not re-execute them; (2) the untracked `c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json` is an unrelated LDIP file, correctly out of scope. `blocks_pack_closeout=false`, `blocks_goal_closeout=false`.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"3aad038d-e75f-4831-b436-b7517ac5ca13","total_cost_usd":2.67483725,"usage":{"input_tokens":217,"cache_creation_input_tokens":126095,"cache_read_input_tokens":2262827,"output_tokens":30118,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":126095,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":684,"cache_read_input_tokens":123009,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3408,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3408},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1190,"outputTokens":21,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.0012950000000000001,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":217,"outputTokens":30118,"cacheReadInputTokens":2262827,"cacheCreationInputTokens":126095,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.67354225,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"Independent read-only review of CP00-687 (RP22 External Integrations I, P07 synthetic fixture/test/evidence/review/closeout tail + P08 evidence-contract foundation bridge; risk C; 150 units; RP22.P07.M06.S03-RP22.P08.M02.S14) via Read/Grep/Glob only.

VERIFIED: (1) Scope/identity consistent across prompt, manifest, both contracts, registry, and validator. (2) Deliverable/phase/micro distributions are internally consistent (sum to 150) and identical across manifest delivery_counts, contract requirements, and registry EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS_I_CP687_REQUIREMENTS; failure_recovery=58 and hermes_evidence=38 spot-counted in the manifest unit list (2 unit arrays, each consistent); enforced by validateExternalIntegrationsICp687Coverage and asserted in model.test.js against the live plan pack. (3) Implementation present/complete in service.js (descriptor, case-set, Hermes packet, Claude packet, closeout handoff) — all Object.freeze, descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload_included=false; resolved through index.js wildcard re-exports; no skip/TODO/placeholder markers. (4) validators.js enforces descriptor-only flags, all runtime_opened=false, no real/golden payloads, no cross-tenant, and authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false. (5) Both contract files regenerated and validated against the deterministic projection. (6) Comprehensive no-write/no-real-data attestation; freeze wrappers stamp synthetic_only/no_real_data/writes_product_state=false and all provider/credential/permission/audit/persistence/command flags false. (7) Claude boundary: read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. (8) Hermes boundary: control-plane evidence/receipt only — hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false, not embedded in product runtime. (9) Pre-review state correct: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress/pending_review; no premature raw-output.json or review-receipt.json; valid_review_receipts=[] and invalid_review_attempts=[] (no laundered invalid evidence). (10) Review hardening: auth preflight returned valid success JSON (exit 0, non-empty stdout); tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob; forbidden_tools_present=false; forbidden_review_evidence taxonomy present (not_logged_in, malformed_json, quota_failure, permission_denied, tool_call_only_output, non_read_only_review). (11) No over-claim of runtime/enterprise-trust anywhere. (12) Pack ordering consistent: upstream CP00-686 (just closed per git log), next CP00-688, live_latest_pack_id=CP00-687.

PROVENANCE CAVEAT: command-evidence.json reports 22/22 validation commands passing (exit 0). As a read-only reviewer I did not and cannot re-execute them; I independently corroborated via source inspection the structural consistency those commands assert (coverage/descriptor validators, contract-projection equality, export resolution). This is reported-but-not-re-executed evidence.

OUT-OF-SCOPE NOTE: docs/ldip-integration/claude-review-results/c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json is an untracked file from a different program (LDIP), correctly listed as an unrelated dirty file in changed-file-scope.json; it is not CP00-687 review evidence and was not treated as such.

The descriptor-verified production_ready claim (descriptor-only, runtime-closed; not an enterprise-trust/runtime claim) is supported by implementation, tests, validation, inspection, and the no-write/no-real-data boundaries. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim and the human/final-approval authority boundary is outside this receipt.
